_note: Curated Open5e reskins for steampunk. Brass-and-boiler renames over real stat blocks; cr denormalized and verified by scripts/test-bestiary.mjs.

entries.name: Boiler Rat
entries.blurb: soot-black vermin of the engine decks

entries.name: Sky-Dock Footpad
entries.blurb: cutpurse working the mooring lines

entries.name: Watch Constable
entries.blurb: brass-buttoned keeper of the peace

entries.name: Gear Gremlin
entries.blurb: small saboteur living in the machinery

entries.name: Aether Devotee
entries.blurb: believes the great engine dreams

entries.name: Sootling
entries.blurb: chimney-dwelling scrap thief

entries.name: Wired Cadaver
entries.blurb: anatomy exhibit on galvanic strings

entries.name: Galvanic Revenant
entries.blurb: corpse jolted back onto the factory line

entries.name: Moor Wolf
entries.blurb: hunts the rail cuttings in packs

entries.name: Clockwork Saber
entries.blurb: fencing automaton's detached arm

entries.name: Guild Chirurgeon
entries.blurb: steam-sterilized healer of the yards

entries.name: Union Buster
entries.blurb: hired knuckles of the factory owners

entries.name: Stokehold Bruiser
entries.blurb: coal-fed strongman of the under-decks

entries.name: Ironclad Marine
entries.blurb: disciplined boarding-party regular

entries.name: Smog Jackal
entries.blurb: feral scavenger of the fog quarters

entries.name: Smog Wraith
entries.blurb: the fog that follows you indoors

entries.name: Corrosion Beetle
entries.blurb: the shipyard's most expensive pest

entries.name: Airship Lookout
entries.blurb: spyglass eyes and a long rifle

entries.name: Firebox Sprite
entries.blurb: escaped furnace elemental, gleefully burning

entries.name: Bodysnatcher
entries.blurb: supplies the anatomy schools, freshly

entries.name: Factory Ghost
entries.blurb: died at the loom, never clocked out

entries.name: Contract Homunculus
entries.blurb: small print given wings and a sting

entries.name: Cable Spinner
entries.blurb: nests in the bridge suspension works

entries.name: Parade Automaton
entries.blurb: ceremonial suit marching without orders

entries.name: Foghorn Siren
entries.blurb: lures ships onto the breakwater

entries.name: Dock Strangler
entries.blurb: waits between the warehouse rows

entries.name: Foreign Agent
entries.blurb: collects blueprints for a rival crown

entries.name: Sky Pirate Captain
entries.blurb: boards merchant dirigibles by lantern-dark

entries.name: Piston-Armed Navvy
entries.blurb: steam-augmented digger gone wild

entries.name: Engine Prophet
entries.blurb: reads scripture in the pressure gauges

entries.name: Foundry Grotesque
entries.blurb: cast-iron ornament with opinions

entries.name: Trapped Strongbox
entries.blurb: the bank's oldest and hungriest vault

entries.name: Steam-Lifter Brute
entries.blurb: dock crane made of muscle and grievance

entries.name: Sewer Guildsman
entries.blurb: the under-city's toll collector

entries.name: Stray Aether Charge
entries.blurb: ball lightning with a taste for crowds

entries.name: Cathedral Engineer
entries.blurb: keeps both the faith and the organ's boilers

entries.name: Courier Gryphon
entries.blurb: the post office's fastest and meanest

entries.name: Tunnel Borer Beast
entries.blurb: acid-spitting thing loose in the metro works

entries.name: Solvent Mass
entries.blurb: industrial cleaner that kept growing

entries.name: Furnace Hound
entries.blurb: coal-eyed guardian of the ironworks

entries.name: The Understudy
entries.blurb: theatrical shapeshifter with ambitions

entries.name: Crimean Campaigner
entries.blurb: old soldier with a clockwork arm

entries.name: Steam Knight
entries.blurb: boiler-backed cavalry in riveted plate

entries.name: Vitrifying Lizard
entries.blurb: the glassworks' terrible secret

entries.name: Aether-Phase Spider
entries.blurb: steps through the luminiferous veil

entries.name: Ornithopter Beast
entries.blurb: vivisectionist's flying masterpiece

entries.name: The Late Foreman
entries.blurb: still docking pay from beyond

entries.name: The Exhibition Piece
entries.blurb: shipped from the colonies, crate now empty

entries.name: Glacier Engine Hound
entries.blurb: coolant-breathing beast of the ice trade

entries.name: Canal Crone
entries.blurb: sells luck at the lock-gates, collects later

entries.name: The Boiler Twins
entries.blurb: two-headed stoker, four fists

entries.name: The Lady of the Gallery
entries.blurb: haunts the exhibition hall's east wing

entries.name: The Cabaret Queen
entries.blurb: her salon swallows fortunes and heirs

entries.name: Aetheric Guardian
entries.blurb: winged spirit bound to the observatory

entries.name: Bridge Troll
entries.blurb: lives under the new iron span, regenerates

entries.name: The Night Shift
entries.blurb: the mill's untiring, unaging workers

entries.name: The Collier's Shade
entries.blurb: risen from the flooded pit disaster

entries.name: The Galvanist's Man
entries.blurb: lightning-born, fears the open flame

entries.name: Boiler Burst
entries.blurb: living explosion pacing the engine room

entries.name: Canal Surge
entries.blurb: the locks flood with purpose

entries.name: Quarry Golem
entries.blurb: the excavation woke something

entries.name: Turbine Djinn
entries.blurb: howls loose from the wind-works

entries.name: Forge Master
entries.blurb: serpentine lord of the great furnace

entries.name: Exhibition Pugilist
entries.blurb: bare-knuckle champion of the iron circuit

entries.name: Tunneling Engine Beast
entries.blurb: part drill, part appetite

entries.name: The Daguerreotype Widow
entries.blurb: her portraits capture subjects entirely

entries.name: Aether-Cloaked Agent
entries.blurb: the ministry's deniable instrument

entries.name: Rogue Aetherist
entries.blurb: science indistinguishable from sorcery

entries.name: Dirigible Raptor
entries.blurb: nests in the mooring masts, stings gasbags

entries.name: The Vivisection
entries.blurb: three creatures, one regrettable grant

entries.name: The Opium Magnate
entries.blurb: giant in silk, faces for every port

entries.name: Difference-Engine Guard
entries.blurb: brass bodyguard slaved to a pocket watch

entries.name: Viaduct Titan
entries.blurb: hurls keystones from the aqueduct

entries.name: The Clockmaker's Knife
entries.blurb: punctual to the second, always

entries.name: Ice-Trade Baron
entries.blurb: giant who owns the northern shipping lanes

entries.name: The Manifold Horror
entries.blurb: cut one pipe-neck, two more vent steam

entries.name: The Séance Serpent
entries.blurb: summoned once, refuses to be dismissed

entries.name: The Repossessor
entries.blurb: the debtor's prison has a basement office

entries.name: The Ironmaster
entries.blurb: giant magnate of the blast furnaces

entries.name: Foundry Colossus
entries.blurb: poured, cooled, and disobedient

entries.name: The Bank Guardian
entries.blurb: granite sentinel of the bullion vault

entries.name: The Thing in the Waterworks
entries.blurb: older than the city above it

entries.name: The Rail Serpent
entries.blurb: lightning-breathing terror of the trunk line

entries.name: The Weather Engine's Spirit
entries.blurb: bound to the barometric works, restless

entries.name: The Furnace Sultan
entries.blurb: fire noble bound in the city's great boiler

entries.name: The Royal Society's Shadow
entries.blurb: every great invention passed his desk first

entries.name: The Colonial Magnate
entries.blurb: untouchable, charming, and backwards-handed

entries.name: The Peer of the Realm
entries.blurb: his lordship has not dined publicly in decades

entries.name: The Leviathan Engine
entries.blurb: the empire's walking siege machine

entries.name: The Firedrake of the Yards
entries.blurb: the old power the new age forgot to fear

entries.name: The Perpetual Chairman
entries.blurb: the company outlived its founder; so did he
